title: Work Orders
description: Orchestrator-authored work-order spec for the privileged JIT-agent under FEAT-006 north-star. A work-order names the target agent, the typed input/output contracts, the substrate-block context handoff, the bounded scope within which the agent may operate, and the deterministic real-check criteria gating acceptance (per DEC-0018; never LLM self-report per FGAP-102 + DEC-0047 clause 5). Substrate-block handoff to the consuming agent uses the existing ContextBlockRef shape (packages/pi-jit-agents/src/types.ts): each context_blocks entry is either a string for whole-block injection, or an object { name, item?, depth?, focus? } for item-specific injection. To handoff a single work-order item to the consuming agent, the agent's .agent.yaml contextBlocks declares { name: "work-orders", item: "WO-001" }; the compiler injects the resolved item under template key _work_orders_item (with companion _work_orders_raw / _work_orders_depth / _work_orders_focus). Authorship: orchestrator is sole spec author per DEC-0047; capability-widening edits are writer.kind=human.

id.description: Canonical work-order id; WO-NNN uppercase + 3-digit per DEC-0026/0027 enacted.

status.description: Work-order lifecycle. Includes the real-check verdict states (real-check-passed / real-check-failed) per DEC-0018 — deterministic verification, never LLM self-report.

target_agent.description: Name of the privileged JIT-agent that consumes this work-order; resolves to <name>.agent.yaml in the agents tier.

input_contract.description: Typed JSON Schema describing what the agent receives as input at dispatch time.

context_blocks.description: Substrate-block references the privileged agent's .agent.yaml will consume via contextBlocks. Each entry: string for whole-block injection (_<name>), OR object { name, item?, depth?, focus? } for item-specific injection (per the existing ContextBlockRef shape in packages/pi-jit-agents/src/types.ts).

output_contract.description: Typed JSON Schema describing the agent's return contract.

scope.description: Bounds within which the agent may make edits / run commands. Used by the capability composer (FEAT-005 / TASK-089) to clamp the agent's grant.

real_check_criteria.description: Deterministic real-check criteria gating acceptance per DEC-0018. NEVER LLM self-report per FGAP-102 + DEC-0047 clause 5.

build_check_test.description: Whether build+check+test exit-code gate applies (typically true).

runtime_demo.description: Runtime demonstration command + expected outcome string-match.

adversarial_probe.description: Adversarial-probe target list — what artifacts a fresh-context agent should re-verify (per DEC-0018 / FGAP-102: deterministic real checks, never LLM self-report).
